title: Leena-Abdullah/CARLIN_CD8_Day_7: Biased TCR clonotypes Code
author: Leena-Abdullah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here we used CARLIN, a progressive lineage tracing mouse model with single-cell RNA- and TCR-sequencing to track endogenous OVA-specific CD8 T-cells responding to acute viral infection. This release contains code used to analyze single-cell RNA-seq data.
steps_raw: Here we used CARLIN, a progressive lineage tracing mouse model with single-cell RNA- and TCR-sequencing to track endogenous OVA-specific CD8 T-cells responding to acute viral infection. This release contains code used to analyze single-cell RNA-seq data.
